title: <div>Sal tries to molest EL - the molestation of young children by young adults<
content:
Sal tries to molest EL - the molestation of young children by young adults
she picks songs that highlights her mood throughout the film
she has a deck of cards she uses to communicate with people sort of like Brian Eno’s deck of cards.
el imagines how the murder might take place in multiple ways — instead of cartoon animations, let this look real, and this will leave the audience with doubts about what is real and what might be fake. Start the film with Sheen dying. She dies two times. First she dies from a simple over dose. Second time she dies violently. Open with intense scene of violence to set up a tone of danger from the get go. Now we know EL could be in grave danger.
implement more scenes of peoples lives in the beginning sequence — character develop all of the main characters right at the beginning of the film.
EL gets denied video footage and she gets DAVE to bring her to the office and retrieve the footage.
Dive deeper into the dark underbelly — think Blue Velvet — this is a story about corruption.

Parental convo montage should be mirrored at the end of the film as in the beginning
